arts.ttl: We simulated Man City vs Arsenal on EA FC 25 to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: Away to City is probably the biggest fixture in Arsenal's calendar, and after 12 Premier League losses in a row to Pep Guardiola's side, the Gunners got the better of their title rivals last season, taking four points from a possible six. We predict that City could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Ederson; Lewis, Akanji, Dias, Gvardiol; Rodri, Gundogan, Foden; Silva, Haaland, Grealish.

arts.ttl: Arsenal expected to re-explore transfer move for summer target ahead of January
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly expected to look again into the possibility of signing Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia ahead of the January transfer window. The 23-year-old was a target for the Gunners in the summer, though the deal didn’t materialise and Neto was brought in instead, coming in as backup goalkeeper behind David Raya, while Aaron Ramsdale […] The post Arsenal expected to re-explore transfer move for summer target ahead of January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without five players for Man City as Gabriel Jesus role 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has admitted he needs every single player to put in a shift against Manchester City when Arsenal make the trip north on Sunday. So, looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 fit senior players available for selection for the game at Man City.
